sql_array: CREATE TABLE graph_data (id INT PRIMARY KEY, data VARCHAR(255) NOT NULL, created_at DATETIME DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO graph_data (id, data) VALUES (1, 'first graph'), (2, 'second graph'), (3, NULL), (4, 'third graph');
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_SUO_DIFF_TTL(SELECT data FROM graph_data WHERE id = 1 AND data IS NOT NULL) AS diff WHERE DB.DBA.RDF_SUO_DIFF_TTL(SELECT data FROM graph_data WHERE IS NOT NULL) IS NOT NULL;
SELECT data, COUNT(*) OVER() AS total_count FROM graph_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL;

SELECT (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM graph_data WHERE created_at > '2020-01-01') AS recent_count, DB.DBA.RDF_SUO_DIFF_TTL(SELECT data FROM graph_data WHERE id = 2 AND data IS NOT NULL) AS second_diff WHERE recent_count IS NOT NULL;
SELECT DISTINCT data FROM graph_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL OR data = '' ORDER BY data;
SELECT MAX(COALESCE(NULLIF(data, ''), 'default')) AS max_data FROM graph_data;
SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_SUO_DIFF_TTL((SELECT data FROM graph_data WHERE id = 3 AND data IS NULL)) AS null_diff WHERE DB.DBA.RDF_SUO_DIFF_TTL(data) IS NOT NULL;

WITH valid_graphs AS (SELECT data FROM graph_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL) SELECT DB.DBA.RDF_SUO_DIFF_TTL(SELECT data FROM valid_graphs) AS valid_diff WHERE EXISTS (SELECT 1 FROM graph_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL);
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_graph AS SELECT * FROM graph_data WHERE data IS NOT NULL;

SELECT temp_graph.data AS temp_data, DB.DBA.RDF_SUO_DIFF_TTL(SELECT data FROM temp_graph WHERE data IS NOT NULL) AS temp_diff FROM temp_graph WHERE temp_graph.data IS NOT NULL ORDER BY temp_data DESC;
